Lumify
Table of Contents

Class WorkspaceController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Manages workspaces (shared spaces) and their memberships: creating, renaming and deleting workspaces, adding and removing members, and querying workspaces and members. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes are pushed live to every affected member over the WorkspaceHub.

[ApiController]
[Route("workspace/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class WorkspaceController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
WorkspaceController

Remarks

Member roles are stored as integers: 1 = Owner, 2 = Admin, 3 = User. Only the owner (role 1) may add/remove members, rename or delete the workspace.

Constructors

WorkspaceController(ILogger<WorkspaceController>, LumifyDbContext, IHubContext<WorkspaceHub>)

Creates the controller with its injected logger, database context and the workspace hub used for live notifications.

public WorkspaceController(ILogger<WorkspaceController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, IHubContext<WorkspaceHub> workspaceHub)

Parameters

logger ILogger<WorkspaceController>
db LumifyDbContext
workspaceHub IHubContext<WorkspaceHub>

Methods

AddWorkspace(AddWorkspaceRequest, CancellationToken)

Creates a new workspace and adds the current user as its owner (role 1).

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>> AddWorkspace(AddWorkspaceRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddWorkspaceRequest

Workspace data (name required).

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>>

200 with the created workspace; 400 if the name is missing; 401 if no user is logged in.

Remarks

Broadcasts a WorkspaceCreated event to the owner's group.

AddWorkspaceMember(AddWorkspaceMemberRequest, CancellationToken)

Adds another user as a member (role 3 = User) to a workspace. Only the owner may add members.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addWorkspaceMember")]
public Task<ActionResult> AddWorkspaceMember(AddWorkspaceMemberRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddWorkspaceMemberRequest

The target workspace and the user to add.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with the new member; 400 on missing IDs or if already a member; 401 if no user is logged in; 403 if the caller is not the owner; 404 if workspace or user does not exist.

Remarks

Broadcasts a WorkspaceMemberAdded event to all current members.

DeleteWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a workspace. Only the owner may delete it.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the workspace ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the caller is not the owner; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

Remarks

The audience is captured before deletion so a WorkspaceDeleted event can still be broadcast to all former members.

GetWorkspaceMembers(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all members of a workspace, each with their user profile and role.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getWorkspaceMembers")]
public Task<IActionResult> GetWorkspaceMembers(string id, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

id string

The workspace ID.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with the list of members; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

GetWorkspaceWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns a single workspace by its ID.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getWorkspaceWithID")]
public Task<IActionResult> GetWorkspaceWithID(string id, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

id string

The workspace ID.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with the workspace; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if it does not exist.

GetWorkspacesOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns all workspaces the current user owns or is a member of, ordered by name.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("GetWorkspacesOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<WorkspaceResponse>>> GetWorkspacesOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<WorkspaceResponse>>>

200 with the list of workspaces; 400 if the user ID cannot be resolved.

RemoveWorkspaceMember(string, string, CancellationToken)

Removes a member from a workspace (soft-delete of the membership). Only the owner may remove members, and the owner cannot be removed.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("removeWorkspaceMember")]
public Task<ActionResult> RemoveWorkspaceMember(string workspaceID, string userID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace to remove the member from.

userID string

The member to remove.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 on success; 400 on missing IDs or attempting to remove the owner; 403 if the caller is not the owner; 404 if the workspace or membership does not exist.

Remarks

Broadcasts a WorkspaceMemberRemoved event to all current members.

SaveWorkspace(SaveWorkspaceRequest, CancellationToken)

Renames a workspace. Only the owner may rename it, and the database is only written if the name actually changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>> SaveWorkspace(SaveWorkspaceRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveWorkspaceRequest

The workspace ID and the new name.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>>

200 with the updated workspace; 400 if the ID is missing or the name is empty; 403 if the caller is not the owner; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

Remarks

On a successful change, a WorkspaceUpdated event is broadcast to all members.
